title: No Rotation Lock
description: Stop Minecraft from locking your rotation while on boats, modded vehicles, riding entities, etc. Mainly used for MCParks
body:
I use this on [mcparks](https://mcparks.us). Some rides and riding entities limit your rotation angles or how far you can look side to side. When in freecam this can be annoying, so this mod was created.

This should also work with other mods/versions. Compatability with SmoothCoasters was added to allow for automatic head rotation while on rides as well.
